film.title: Kyaa Kool Hain Hum 3
film.overview: In order to impress his girlfriend's conservative father, a porn actor uses his fellow adult movie stars in creating a fake traditional family.

dialogues.dialogue: I thought you two are tired of doing good things. Now you'll do some bad things. Aren't you ashamed? You make BP. Not BP...DP. - DP? Yeah...Dirty Picture.
His face reminds me...of Rocky. Rocky? Rocky who? He was a shameless and cheap guy. He turned his granny...into super-granny. I mean she's dead. Is that what happened?

Someone help him. Forgive me, son. I should be ashamed of myself. You were thinking of making him your wife. But me, his father..I was thinking of making him his mother. - Papa..That means..you're Kanhaiya's real father.
dialogues.cause_raw: hiding the truth about his son's parentage

dialogues.dialogue: 6609823... call me. Come on, let's plan for the second one. I am really proud of you today. Even though you stayed out of our country for so long......but you haven't forgotten our culture yet. You'll be blessed.
